context.goal: Remove the currently selected character from the title text.
context.cues: A single character in the centered title is highlighted red, and the text editing toolbar is visible at the top.

state_anchor.locator: red selection highlight on the selected title character

anchors.locator: top text toolbar button labeled 'Delete' with red X icon

procedure.expect: The selected character is removed from the title, changing the visible text from 'arketing Basics' to 'aketing Basics'.
